title: Traditional Polish Pork Stew
description: A hearty, comforting stew made with tender pork and a blend of traditional polish spices.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the pork and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Remove the pork from the pot and set aside.
Add the onion, carrot, and celery to the pot and cook until the vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the flour to the pot and cook for 1 minute.
Gradually add the broth to the pot, whisking constantly.
Return the pork to the pot and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 2 hours.
Add the sausage to the pot and cook for an additional 30 minutes.
Season with thyme, salt, and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
